2605.15184.title: Is Grep All You Need? How Agent Harnesses Reshape Agentic Search
2605.15184.paper_summary: Recent advances in Large Language Model (LLM) agents have enabled complex agentic workflows where models autonomously retrieve information, call tools, and reason over large corpora to complete tasks on behalf of users. Despite the growing adoption of retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) in agentic search systems, existing literature lacks a systematic comparison of how retrieval strategy choice interacts with agent architecture and tool-calling paradigm. Important practical dimensions, including how tool outputs are presented to the model and how performance changes when searches must cope with more irrelevant surrounding text, remain under-explored in agent loops. This paper reports an empirical study organized into two experiments. Experiment 1 compares grep and vector retrieval on a 116-question sample from LongMemEval, using a custom agent harness (Chronos) and provider-native CLI harnesses (Claude Code, Codex, and Gemini CLI), for both inline tool results and file-based tool results that the model reads separately. Experiment 2 compares grep-only and vector-only retrieval while progressively mixing in additional unrelated conversation history, so that each query is embedded in more distracting material alongside the passages that matter. Across Chronos and the provider CLIs, grep generally yields higher accuracy than vector retrieval in our comparisons in experiment 1; at the same time, overall scores still depend strongly on which harness and tool-calling style is used, even when the underlying conversation data are the same.
2605.15184.paper_summary_zh: 最近在大型語言模型（LLM）代理方面的進展使得模型能夠自主檢索信息、調用工具並對大量語料進行推理，以代表用戶完成任務，從而實現複雜的代理工作流程。儘管在代理搜索系統中檢索增強生成（RAG）的採用不斷增長，但現有文獻缺乏對檢索策略選擇如何與代理架構和工具調用範式互動的系統比較。重要的實際維度，包括工具輸出如何呈現給模型，以及當搜索必須應對更多無關的周圍文本時性能如何變化，在代理循環中仍然未被充分探索。本文報告了一項實證研究，分為兩個實驗。實驗1比較了在LongMemEval的116個問題樣本上使用自定義代理工具（Chronos）和供應商原生CLI工具（Claude Code、Codex和Gemini CLI）的grep和向量檢索，針對模型分別讀取的內聯工具結果和基於文件的工具結果。實驗2比較了僅使用grep和僅使用向量檢索，同時逐步混入額外的無關對話歷史，以便每個查詢都嵌入更多干擾材料，與重要段落並列。在Chronos和供應商CLI中，在我們的實驗1比較中，grep通常比向量檢索產生更高的準確性；同時，整體得分仍然強烈依賴於使用的工具和調用風格，即使基礎對話數據相同。
2605.15184.author: Sahil Sen et.al.
2605.15184.authors: Sahil Sen, Akhil Kasturi, Elias Lumer, Anmol Gulati, Vamse Kumar Subbiah
